phrase.text: Interviewer – What does this framework include?

Captain James – For ships, the framework includes requirements for: • <Ship security plans|ship security plans> • Ship security officers • Company security officers • <Certain onboard equipment|certain onboard equipment>

Captain James – For port facilities, the requirements include: • Port facility security plans • <Port facility security officers|port facility security officers> • Certain security equipment In addition the requirements for ships and for port facilities include: • Monitoring and controlling <access> • Monitoring the activities of <people and cargo> • Ensuring <security communications> are readily available
Interviewer – Thank you for your time Captain James, I feel I know much more about the ISPS Code now.
